name: gradious-career-portal
description: Gradious Career Portal — monorepo (React UI + Express API), release v1.0.0

scripts.bootstrap: npm install --prefix career-portal-react && npm install --prefix career-portal-backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run start --prefix career-portal-react" "npm run dev --prefix career-portal-backend"
scripts.test: echo "No root tests; use npm test --prefix career-portal-react" && exit 0
